title: Smoky Slovakian Pork Casserole
description: A hearty, smoky pork casserole with an authentic Slovakian twist. This comforting dish is perfect for a chilly evening.

ingredients.name: Casserole Topping
ingredients.notes: A mixture of breadcrumbs, chopped parsley, and grated cheddar cheese

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside. Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked pork, onion mixture, and torn bread. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish and top with the casserole topping.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
